articles.title: Wildfire in southern Spain leaves at least 12 dead and 23 missing
articles.summary: A local official said four of the victims may be British after a fire broke out near Los Gallardos, Almería.

articles.title: East Asia braces for destructive typhoon as landslides kill 15 in Philippines
articles.summary: Heading for Taiwan and south-eastern China, the 1,000 km-wide Bavi is forecast to be one of the strongest storms in decades.

articles.title: Zulu king expresses regret after video captures tirade against his wife
articles.summary: In the footage widely shared in South Africa, King Misuzulu threatens to physically assault his wife and accuses her of cheating.

articles.title: Man fatally shot by ICE in Houston was not intended target, DHS says
articles.summary: Immigration agents were looking for a different person when they shot Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during a traffic stop, officials say.

articles.title: Man nearly sucked out of window mid-air on Ryanair plane, passengers say
articles.summary: The man's wife held onto his legs for around five minutes to stop him from being sucked out, officials say.

articles.title: Boxy forms and odd lights: US declassifies more UFO files
articles.summary: The US government published a fourth instalment of unresolved cases, promising to release more files on a rolling basis.

articles.title: China lands reusable rocket for first time, state media says
articles.summary: It follows similar landings of reusable rockets by US-owned companies SpaceX and Blue Origin.

articles.title: Nolan Wells' family demands answers about US teen's death after boating trip
articles.summary: Wells' body was found in the water near Mississippi's Horn Island days after he went on a boating trip there with friends.

articles.title: Superb Sinner ends Djokovic's latest bid for history
articles.summary: Jannik Sinner produces a devastating display to end Novak Djokovic's latest bid for history and set up a Wimbledon final against Alexander Zverev.

articles.title: Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies
articles.summary: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.
